Developer Blog

Insights & Updates

Technical deep dives, API updates, and engineering best practices for building voice-first AI applications.

Architecture Jan 13, 2026

The Latency Stack: How We Architect Voice AI for Sub-200ms Response

Voice AI that feels human requires response times humans don't consciously notice. Here's how we architect for that constraint.

SF Seth Ford 10 min read
Integration Jan 10, 2026

Tool Integration via MCP: How We Connect Voice AI to External Services

The Model Context Protocol (MCP) standardizes how AI agents discover and use tools. Here's why we've built native support—and how it works.

SF Seth Ford
12 min read
Mission Jan 10, 2026

Why Ferni Is Free Forever

Everyone deserves someone who truly pays attention. We're building AI that embodies the best parts of human connection—and keeping it free for everyone who needs it.

SF Seth Ford
6 min read
Architecture Jan 8, 2026

How Ferni's Memory Actually Works

The 'Ferni remembered...' moment is our signature brand experience. Here's the architecture that makes it possible.

SF Seth Ford
8 min read
Philosophy Jan 8, 2026

Why We're Building Voice AI Differently

Most voice AI treats conversation as a technical problem. We think it's a relationship problem. Here's the philosophy behind Ferni's architecture.

SF Seth Ford
8 min read
